subject: [RFC PATCH v4 13/27] mm/mempolicy: NP_OPS_MEMPOLICY - support private node mempolicy

reviews.author: Gregory Price
reviews.summary: The reviewer posted the original patch with a request for design feedback. They explained that some private nodes want to directly allocate from the node via set_mempolicy() and mbind(), but don't want that node as normal allocable system memory in the fallback lists.

2026-02-22.patch_summary: This patch series introduces a new flag, NP_OPS_MEMPOLICY, which allows private nodes to support memory policy operations. The patch adds this flag to the node's ops structure and updates various functions in mm/mempolicy.c to use it. It also updates sysfs attributes to include N_MEMORY_PRIVATE nodes with NP_OPS_MEMPOLICY set.
